title: Lecturer Quiz: RNNs, LSTMs & GRUs - Multiple Response

questions.question: Which of the following NLP tasks can be performed by a many-to-many RNN-based encoder-decoder architecture:

options.A: Machine Translation: translating a sentence in one language into a sentence in another.
options.B: Textual entailment: given two sentences, decide whether the one entails the other.
options.C: Sentence parsing: given a natural language sentence, generate its parse tree.
options.D: Text summarisation: given a natural language text, generate a reduced (in volume) version of it.
